title: Essentially Tenshi
description: A pack for those who enjoy the essentials in life, and nothing more.
body:
Sometimes the simple things in life are what make us happy. Essentially Tenshi strives to make small tweaks to Vanilla Minecraft items that aren't overbearing, and are still pleasing to the eye.


Essentially Tenshi simply takes the default minecraft items and textures and resprites them.

-----

**Copyright Notice**
Usage Terms:

You are permitted to use the textures from this pack in both commercial and non-commercial video games, personal projects, and related promotional materials. You may edit the textures as needed for your projects. You can also publish work using these textures on websites related to art, games, and similar content.

**Restrictions:**

- You cannot resell, repackage, or redistribute the textures in their original or modified form.
- You cannot use the textures or derivatives in logos, trademarks, or service marks.
- You cannot include these textures in game-making tools or code templates.
- You cannot use the textures to train AI image generators.
- You cannot use the textures for the creation or promotion of NFTs, cryptocurrency, blockchain, or web3 projects.
- You cannot use the textures in any printed media or physical products.
  
**Credit Requirement:**

When using these textures, you must provide proper credit to the original creator. You may use the textures on servers and in your own packs as long as you give appropriate credit and do not resell them.

If you have any questions, please contact me at eyelesstenshi on Discord.
